mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_receipt_template (group_id, printer_type, layout, enabled) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{printerType}, #{layout}::jsonb, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_receipt_template SET layout = #{layout}::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId}
UPDATE wms_receipt_template SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND printer_type = #{printerType}
mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id, printer_type, layout::text AS layout, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_receipt_template WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND printer_type = #{printerType}
SELECT id, group_id, printer_type, layout::text AS layout, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_receipt_template WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND printer_type = #{printerType} AND enabled = TRUE
